title: French Beef Casserole
description: A hearty, indulgent French-inspired casserole made with tender beef and rich flavors. Perfect for a cold evening.
instructions: Cook the sliced onions and mushrooms in butter until softened.
Add the ground beef to the pan and cook until browned.
Add the flour to the pan and stir to combine.
Gradually add the beef broth and red wine, whisking continuously.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook until thickened.
Stir in the mushroom gravy mix.
Slice the French baguette into 1-inch pieces.
In a separate baking dish, arrange a layer of baguette slices.
Top with a layer of the beef mixture, followed by a layer of grated cheese.
Repeat the layers two more times, finishing with a layer of cheese on top.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
